UserBlob.title: UserBlob
UserBlob.description: An organic shape generated by a user.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user who created the blob.

color.description: The hex color code of the blob.

svgPath.description: The SVG path data (d attribute) of the blob.

complexity.description: The complexity setting used to generate the blob.

contrast.description: The contrast setting used to generate the blob.

timestamp.description: The time the blob was saved.

/userBlobs/{blobId}.description: Collection of shapes saved by users.
